basics.name: Saurav Sagar
basics.title: Operations Management
basics.summary: Operations and Supply Chain professional with experience in logistics execution, vendor coordination, and data-driven process improvement. Skilled in Power BI, SQL, and advanced Excel to analyse operational performance, optimise capacity utilisation, and support decision-making. Currently pursuing PGDM in Operations Management /& Data Analytics.

experience.company: OM Logistics Supply Chain Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Tracked daily operations and shipment movements of 50+ vehicles, ensuring 92% alignment between planned schedules and actual field execution through real-time monitoring and variance analysis.
Conducted variance analysis on manpower utilisation, trip hours, and load planning, driving an 18% improvement in operational efficiency through data-backed workforce and capacity optimisation.
Coordinated with 20+ transport partners and warehouse teams to resolve bottlenecks, improving service-level adherence from 83% to 95% within two months.
Led root cause analysis of delivery delays, shortages, and execution mismatches, reducing average delivery delays by 2 days through targeted process improvement initiatives.
Managed 1,200+ service requests with a 95% first-contact resolution rate across 8 regions, supporting logistics and fleet clients with fast, accurate operational responses.
Coordinated with internal operations, tech, and field teams to resolve 500+ service disruptions, reducing average incident resolution time by 25%.
Streamlined support workflows via CRM automation and ticket routing optimisation, cutting average resolution time from 4 hours to 3 hours.
Identified recurring issue patterns and proposed preventive workflows, reducing repeat escalations and improving customer data accuracy.
Supported sales and distribution operations across 6+ retail locations by analysing store-level sales and stock data, reducing stockouts by 18% and improving product availability by 22%.
Coordinated with 2+ distributors and retailers, maintaining inventory records and ensuring timely replenishment and SKU visibility for 5+ field representatives.

achievements.context: Between planned schedules and actual field execution at OM Logistics
Improvement in operational efficiency through data-backed optimisation
First-contact resolution rate across 8 regions at WheelsEye
Reduction in average incident resolution time for service disruptions

projects.title: Delhivery Logistics Performance Dashboard
bullets: Data analytics dashboard built in Power BI to evaluate end-to-end logistics operations, featuring KPI tracking, cut-off compliance analysis, and shipment trend visualisation.
Incorporated correlation analysis between planned vs. actual delivery metrics to surface execution gaps and support data-driven operational decisions.

education.institution: G L Bajaj Institute of Management & Research

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce — Accounting & Business Management

certifications: PMI Certified Professional in Managing AI (PMI-CPMAI)™
extra: Skilled in analysing operational performance and optimising capacity utilisation.
